description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a long cylindrical barrel and a prominent handguard that extends nearly the full length of the weapon. The body is primarily matte black, with a boxy receiver and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A scope or optical sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not modeled. The muzzle is simple, lacking any visible flash hider or suppressor. The overall construction appears to be metal, with some polymer components for the grip and possibly the handguard.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a long barrel, top-mounted scope, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, handguard, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the handguard and scope.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the pistol grip, with the scope visible on top.
